TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_gaga’_na_zyay’, title = gaga’_na_zyay’, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/gaga’_na_zyay’} }

S.FORM: gaga' na zyay' gaga' na pslpyungan Tayal hya' ga, gaga' na zyay' sawn uzi. gaga' na pslpyungan Tayal nanu' iy kya qu wal naha' ginpawngan maha cyux inu' qu blaq balay na laqi' knayril lga, mutuw naha s'usa' magal squ mrhuw na squliq musa' pglaing laha musa' smzyay'.

gaga' na zyay' gaga' na pslpyungan Tayal hya' ga, gaga' na zyay' sawn uzi. gaga' na pslpyungan Tayal nanu' iy kya qu wal naha' ginpawngan maha cyux inu' qu blaq balay na laqi' knayril lga, mutuw naha s'usa' magal squ mrhuw na squliq musa' pglaing laha musa' smzyay'.
S.PHON: ɣaɣaʔ na zjajʔ ɣaɣaʔ na ps~ɕlpjuŋan tajal ħjaʔ ɣa, ɣaɣaʔ na zjajʔ s~ɕawn uzi. ɣaɣaʔ na ps~ɕlpjuŋan tajal nanuʔ ij kja qu wal naħaʔ ɣinpawŋan maħa ʦ~ʨjux inuʔ qu βlaq βalaj na laqiʔ knajril lɣa, mutuw naħa s~ɕʔus~ɕaʔ maɣal s~ɕqu mrħuw na s~ɕquliq mus~ɕaʔ pɣlaiŋ laħa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmzjajʔ.
